user_query: I forgot my password and cannot login

retrieval_result.title: Password reset issue
retrieval_result.solution: Use the password reset portal. If your account is locked, wait 15 minutes or contact IT support.

final_response: Your issue has been classified as Access. Suggested solution: Use the password reset portal. If your account is locked, wait 15 minutes or contact IT support.
